name: primeinbox
description: PrimeInbox — Advanced Email Outreach SaaS Platform

scripts.install:all: cd email-outreach && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.prisma:push: cd email-outreach && npx prisma db push
scripts.build:all: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.deploy: npm run install:all && npm run build:all
